fixtureList.tags: LNG; Stena Bulk AB (#303); Comm: Yes

offhireList.remark: Unplanned - steam leak in the E/R. Vessel had to slow down to 6 kn for 2:15 hrs and consume VLSFO & MGO instead of LNG. Since time is less than 3 hrs this should not be off hire under TCP; however, Chrtrs are likely to bill the fuel consumed. Prices TBA.
